  • Click on a node to lock focus on that node. The node with the current focus will pulse. Click off of a node to release the lock.
  • Dragging a node will fix its position on the screen. Double-click a fixed-position node to unfreeze it.
Key Action
s Nodes glow :D
c remove glow
p Print mode - white backgrounds
d Display mode - black backgrounds
z Turn off gravity
m Spacious layout
e Tight layout
f Freeze layout
x Unfreeze all nodes
